name: coderabbit-node-app
description: Example Node.js TypeScript app wired for GitHub Actions CI

scripts.prebuild: node -e "var p=process.version.slice(1).split('.');if(+p[0]<20){console.error('Node.js 20+ is required (you have '+process.version+'). Use nvm/fnm: nvm install && nvm use');process.exit(1);}"
